title: 2X 60 Fluorescent Neon Card Stars 6cm – Bundled by GetInStyle Shop
features: VIBRANT ACCENT -- 60 stars per pack in assorted bright fluorescent colours (neon pink, green, yellow, orange) to capture attention.
VERSATILE SIZE -- The 60mm (2.5-inch) diameter is ideal for pricing tags, sale tickets, craft work, school projects, decoration, home & office use.
CREATIVE USE -- Made from durable cardboard, suitable for crafts, classroom decorations, parties, or shop displays.
NON-ADHESIVE -- Allows flexibility in attachment method (glue, tape, tack) depending on the surface.
Package contents: 2x 60 Fluorescent Neon Card Stars, 6cm. The actual packaging may vary.
description: This pack of 2x 60 Fluorescent Stars (60mm diameter) is a bright and economical way to instantly draw attention to your products, promotions, or creative projects. The stars are made from light yet durable ticket board in assorted neon colours, including bright pink, green, yellow, and orange. Their intense fluorescent shade ensures they stand out in any setting, whether it's a retail display, a classroom bulletin board, or party décor. These stars are non-adhesive, giving you complete freedom to choose your method of attachment: use glue, tape, tacks, or pins depending on the surface. They are ideal for creating eye-catching tags, highlighting seasonal sales, or adding a festive mood to any space.
